title: cercidiphyllum magnificum
intro: Cercidiphyllum magnificum, also known as the Katsura tree, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia, characterized by its stunning fall colors and unique fragrance when its leaves are crushed. The medicinal properties of Cercidiphyllum magnificum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are obtained from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of consuming Katsura tree extracts include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as improved digestion and reduced blood sugar levels. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cercidiphyllum magnificum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
